name: Tropical Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and cube the chicken.
2. In a bowl, combine chutney, curry powder, and mayonnaise.
3. Combine all other ingredients in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the curry, chutney, and mayonaisse mixture into the chicken mixture.
5. Serve on watercress or lettuce leaves, with slices of avocado.
